title: Ashen + Lootr Compat
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen 16x and Lootr
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) with [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/project/EltpO5cN)? Tired of certain blocks and items using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this add-on is for you!

Place this pack _above_ Ashen in your load order.

<details>
<summary>Included textures:</summary>

- Lootr chests
- Lootr barrels
- Lootr trapped chests
- Lootr shulker boxes

</details>

<hr/>

**Credits to:**
- [Aim_Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/vglxcci2) for the amazing [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) resource pack
- [noobanidus](https://modrinth.com/user/noobanidus) & Co. for the super useful [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/project/EltpO5cN) mod

<hr/>

❗For any issues, questions, or suggestions regarding this add-on, please contact me through my email bunofthesun@gmail.com or drop me a message on the official [Ashen Discord](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh) @carrotsandsoup.
